---
id: list-projects
title: "List projects"
description: "Admins see all projects. Members see only projects where they have explicit access (via ProjectMember or ProjectTeam)."
sidebar_label: "List projects"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/meridianjs-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"List projects"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/projects"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Admins see all projects. Members see only projects where they have explicit access (via ProjectMember or ProjectTeam).

  id={"request"}
